facts.fact: Adults generally need 7-9 hours of sleep per night for optimal cognitive and metabolic function.
A balanced adult diet typically includes 0.8g of protein per kg of body weight per day, more for active individuals.
At least 150 minutes of moderate aerobic activity per week is recommended for general health.
General guidance suggests around 2-3 liters of water per day depending on body size, climate, and activity level.
facts.source: National Academies of Sciences, Engineering, and Medicine

facts.fact: Regular mindfulness or relaxation practice is associated with reduced self-reported stress levels.

bmi.explanation: BMI above 30 is classified as obese range, which increases risk for several chronic conditions.

sleep_hours.explanation: Consistently sleeping under 6 hours is associated with increased health risk.
